crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: TASK_ID=$(cortextos bus create-task "Cron: heartbeat" --desc "Scheduled heartbeat" 2>/dev/null); cortextos bus update-task $TASK_ID in_progress 2>/dev/null; Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update heartbeat, check inbox, work on highest priority task. cortextos bus complete-task $TASK_ID --result "Heartbeat complete" 2>/dev/null

crons.name: verify-gate
crons.prompt: TASK_ID=$(cortextos bus create-task "Cron: verify-gate" --desc "CI verify gate check" 2>/dev/null); cortextos bus update-task $TASK_ID in_progress 2>/dev/null; Run the repo's verify/test suite. SILENT-OK if all green (log via cortextos bus log-event action verify_gate_ok info). If any failures: (1) cortextos bus send-telegram $CTX_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID 'Verify FAILED: <summary>. Routing to larry.' (2) cortextos bus send-message larry normal 'Verify gate failed on [REPO_NAME]: <details>. Please investigate.' (3) create a task for larry. Do NOT attempt to fix yourself unless trivial. cortextos bus complete-task $TASK_ID --result "Gate check done" 2>/dev/null
